title: coprosma esulcata
intro: Coprosma esulcata, also known as the mirror plant or looking glass plant, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Herbal preparations of Coprosma esulcata typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
